## What

<!-- One sentence: what should BannerBye do that it doesn't yet? -->

## Why

<!-- Who benefits, and how? Concrete examples land better than abstract claims. -->

## How (optional)

<!-- If you've thought about implementation: outline it. If not, leave blank — we'll figure it out. -->

## Reading the principles first

Before filing: please read the [Principles section in the README](../../#principles). We deliberately do not add:
- CSS-hide fallbacks (hiding ≠ refusing)
- Telemetry, analytics, or crash-reporting
- Streak-pressure UI, daily push-notifications, or "Pro unlock" bait
- A sync/account server (we use browser-native sync only)

Suggestions that conflict with these will be politely declined.
